name: upspa-relaxed-user-study
description: Agile, local-first UpSPA browser-extension prototype for usability studies.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:client && pnpm run build:extension
scripts.dev:extension: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:client && pnpm --filter upspa-extension run dev
scripts.test: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:client && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:rust
scripts.test:unit: pnpm run test:client && pnpm run test:extension
scripts.verify: pnpm run build && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint:rust && pnpm run test:rust
